commit.message: HADOOP-18919. Zookeeper SSL/TLS support in HDFS ZKFC (#6194)

verification.payload:
tree aaa99a144b23eb2a5feac1d7d295be12d7aea73a
parent 5eeab5e1b9721326cfbb2e7f8fbc4f4b372a2697
author Zita Dombi <50611074+dombizita@users.noreply.github.com> 1698084195 +0200
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1698084195 -0700

HADOOP-18919. Zookeeper SSL/TLS support in HDFS ZKFC (#6194)

files.patch:
@@ -3756,6 +3756,14 @@
   </description>
 </property>
 
+<property>
+  <name>dfs.ha.zkfc.client.ssl.enabled</name>
+  <value>false</value>
+  <description>
+    Enable SSL/TLS encryption for the ZooKeeper communication from ZKFC.
+  </description>
+</property>
+
 <property>
   <name>dfs.ha.nn.not-become-active-in-safemode</name>
   <value>false</value>
